name: Banana Nut Bread2
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together butter and sugar in a mixing bowl.
2. Add bananas, shredded carrot, lemon juice, and eggs to the mixture. Mix well with an electric mixer until combined.
3. Stir together the self-rising flour and nutmeg separately.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture to the banana mixture, stirring just until the flour is incorporated.
5. Stir in the chopped pecans.
6. Line an 8-inch square glass baking dish with wax paper.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and microwave on high for about 8 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Rotate the dish every two minutes if your microwave does not have a rotating tray built-in.
8. Allow the bread to rest for 5 minutes before turning it out onto a wire rack to cool completely.
9. Peel off the wax paper and cut into squares to serve.
